## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` is clean
- [ ] `pytest` passes, and new/changed code is covered
- [ ] Docs updated in this PR if a documented surface changed (README)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits and are logically scoped
